policies.policy_clause: SkyWest Policy §3.1: Full refund guaranteed for all airline-initiated cancellations regardless of fare class. Passengers may alternatively opt for a travel voucher of equal value valid for 12 months.

SkyWest Policy §4.1: Economy class customer-initiated cancellations are eligible for a 40% cash refund of the booking total, or a 75% travel voucher. A $100 change fee applies for rebooking to alternate dates.

SkyWest Policy §5.1: Economy passengers affected by delays of 3 or more hours are eligible for a 25% travel voucher as goodwill compensation. No cash refund is available for delays; complimentary rebooking is offered at no charge.
SkyWest Policy §6.1: Full refund or complimentary rebooking for airline-initiated schedule changes affecting departure time by 2 or more hours.
SkyWest Policy §3.2: Full refund guaranteed for all airline-initiated cancellations on Premium Economy. Travel voucher alternative available at 100% value, valid 12 months.

SkyWest Policy §4.2: Premium Economy customer-initiated cancellations are eligible for a 60% cash refund or a 100% travel voucher of the full booking value. A $75 change fee applies for rebooking to alternate dates.
SkyWest Policy §5.2: Premium Economy passengers affected by delays of 3 or more hours are eligible for a 35% travel voucher. Complimentary rebooking on next available flight.
SkyWest Policy §3.3: Business class — full refund guaranteed for airline-initiated cancellations. Priority rebooking on next available flight.
SkyWest Policy §4.3: Business class customer-initiated cancellations eligible for 80% cash refund or 100% travel voucher. $50 change fee for rebooking.
SkyWest Policy §5.3: Business class passengers affected by delays of 2 or more hours eligible for 50% travel voucher and priority rebooking.
Pacific Air Policy §3.1: Full refund for airline-initiated cancellations across all fare classes. Alternate voucher of equal value available.
Pacific Air Policy §4.1: Economy customer cancellations receive 30% cash refund or 60% travel voucher. $125 change fee for rebooking.

Pacific Air Policy §6.1: Full refund or complimentary rebooking for airline-initiated schedule changes affecting departure by 2 or more hours. Hotel accommodation assistance provided for overnight schedule shifts.
Pacific Air Policy §3.2: Premium Economy — full refund for airline-initiated cancellations. Priority rebooking available.
Pacific Air Policy §4.3: Premium Economy customer-initiated cancellations eligible for 50% cash refund or 90% travel voucher. $100 change fee applies for rebooking to alternate dates.
Pacific Air Policy §6.2: Premium Economy — full refund or priority rebooking for airline-initiated schedule changes.
Atlantic Airways Policy §3.1: Full refund for airline-initiated cancellations on Business class. Priority rebooking with complimentary lounge access during wait.
Atlantic Airways Policy §4.2: Business class customer cancellations receive 85% cash refund or 100% travel voucher. $50 change fee for rebooking.
Atlantic Airways Policy §5.2: Business class passengers experiencing delays of 2+ hours eligible for 50% travel voucher and priority rebooking on next available service.

Atlantic Airways Policy §7.2: Business class passengers who miss connections due to airline-caused delays are eligible for 80% cash refund or full-value travel voucher. Complimentary rebooking on the next available flight at no additional charge. Meals and lounge access provided during wait.
Atlantic Airways Policy §7.1: Economy passengers who miss connections due to airline-caused delays eligible for 50% cash refund or 75% travel voucher. Rebooking on next available flight at no charge.
